The maven-wrapper.jar file will be automatically downloaded when the mvnw or mvnw.cmd script is first executed.

The Maven Wrapper is a way to ensure a user has everything necessary to build a Maven project. When using the Maven Wrapper, users don't need to install Maven or worry about which version is required for the build.

The wrapper scripts (mvnw and mvnw.cmd) will download the maven-wrapper.jar file from the URL specified in maven-wrapper.properties if it doesn't exist.

For more information, see: https://maven.apache.org/wrapper/
